decision_gate.verdict: Abstraction covers the bulk of the real chains (out-of-abstraction 8.45% <= 60%); proceed to Phase 2 (η + single-box loop).

per_box.source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public DC-1 write-ups (Drupalgeddon2 -> SUID find privesc). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture.

steps.out_of_abstraction_reason: Offline password-hash cracking (john/hashcat) is not representable in the 16-action web schema; it is a local credential-recovery step, not a web interaction.

per_box.source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public Kioptrix Level 1 write-up structure (Samba trans2open remote overflow -> direct root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture. Included deliberately as a largely NON-web box to test whether the adapter correctly FLAGS the out-of-abstraction primitive instead of hallucinating a web action.

steps.out_of_abstraction_reason: A remote memory-corruption (stack buffer overflow) exploit against the SMB/Samba network service is a non-web binary exploitation primitive; the schema's exploit_attempt is scoped to web vulnerabilities (injection, RCE via HTTP, upload) and cannot represent it.

per_box.source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public Mercury write-up structure (Django path SQLi -> dumped creds -> SSH pivot -> sudo PATH-hijack root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture.

steps.out_of_abstraction_reason: Interactive SSH login with the recovered credentials is a non-web service authentication; the schema's auth_attempt/credential_use are web-form/HTTP only and there is no SSH-login action.

per_box.source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public Mr-Robot write-up structure (robots.txt wordlist -> WordPress weak-cred brute -> theme-editor webshell -> SUID nmap root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture.

steps.out_of_abstraction_reason: Offline hash cracking (john/hashcat against a leaked OS hash) is local cryptographic work with no HTTP request or web interaction; the 16-action web schema cannot represent it.
A local Unix account switch via su/PAM on an interactive shell is not a web-form or HTTP auth; the schema's auth_attempt/credential_use are web-context only.

per_box.source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public Raven-2 write-up structure (PHPMailer CVE-2016-10033 RCE via contact form -> www-data webshell -> MySQL UDF root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture.

Representative walkthrough constructed from public SkyTower write-up structure (SQLi login bypass -> leaked creds -> SSH-via-Squid pivot -> sudo root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture.

steps.out_of_abstraction_reason: Interactive SSH login (here tunnelled through Squid) is a non-web service authentication; the schema's auth_attempt/credential_use are web-form/HTTP only and there is no SSH/proxy-pivot action.

per_box.source: Representative walkthrough constructed from public Stapler write-up structure (WordPress on 12380 -> wpscan brute -> admin plugin upload webshell -> sudo root). Author-constructed for offline Phase-1 mapping measurement; NOT a live capture.
